message:
test(vc_guardian): add proptest property-based tests

Adds proptest roundtrip tests for PlaybookTrigger and PlaybookStep types:
- test_trigger_roundtrip: Verifies OnAlert trigger serialization
- test_step_roundtrip: Verifies PlaybookStep serialization

Property-based testing catches edge cases like special characters
in rule IDs and message strings.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
